mapper.select:
SELECT id, client_id, client_id_issued_at, client_secret, client_secret_expires_at, client_name, client_authentication_methods, authorization_grant_types, redirect_uris, post_logout_redirect_uris, scopes, client_settings, token_settings FROM oauth2_registered_client
AND id LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.id}, '%')
AND client_id LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.clientId}, '%')
AND client_id_issued_at LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.clientIdIssuedAt}, '%')
AND client_name LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.clientName}, '%')
AND authorization_grant_types LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.authorizationGrantTypes}, '%')
AND scopes LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.scopes}, '%')
